subject: Re: [PATCH v7 2/3] mm: vmscan: add cgroup IDs to vmscan tracepoints

reviews.author: Masami (Google)
reviews.summary:
Reviewer noted that the patch does not handle the case where a cgroup is being destroyed, and requested that the patch be updated to handle this scenario

Reviewer Masami suggested using the existing common_pid field in the tracepoint format to store the current process ID, instead of duplicating it.
